title: microsoft/presidio
friendlyTitle: Presidio helps remove private data before AI sees it
summary: Presidio is Microsoft’s open-source framework for detecting, redacting, masking, and anonymizing sensitive data across text, images, DICOM medical images, and structured data.
friendlySummary: Presidio is an open-source tool for finding and hiding sensitive information like names, phone numbers, and medical image text.
whyItMatters: Teams can use it as a privacy layer around AI workflows, logs, datasets, and customer-support pipelines. It is especially relevant when feeding real business data into LLM or analytics systems.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help teams protect private data before using it with AI tools, reports, or support systems.
